title: Front Office Manager - Sodexo India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Sodexo India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Sodexo India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Gurgaon. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sodexo India:
Sodexo India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sodexo India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
